tagline: A coastal contemporary masterpiece steps from La Jolla Cove, with sweeping Pacific views and refined interiors.
description:
Set in the heart of La Jolla Village, this coastal contemporary residence pairs clean architectural lines with curated finishes and panoramic Pacific views. Floor-to-ceiling glass in the great room frames endless ocean horizons, while the chef's kitchen — appointed with Thermador appliances, quartzite countertops, and custom cabinetry — opens to a covered terrace designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living.

The primary suite occupies the entire upper floor, offering a private ocean-view deck, a spa-style bath with soaking tub, and dual walk-in closets. Three additional bedrooms and a dedicated home office provide flexible space for families and remote workers alike. The rear courtyard features a resort-caliber pool, a built-in outdoor kitchen, and low-maintenance drought-tolerant landscaping.

Steps from La Jolla Cove, the village's acclaimed dining scene, world-class galleries, and UC San Diego, this is one of Southern California's most coveted addresses.
features: Panoramic Pacific Ocean views
Chef's kitchen with Thermador appliances and quartzite counters
Primary suite with private ocean-view deck
Resort-style pool and built-in outdoor kitchen
Three-car attached garage with EV charging
Solar array with battery backup
Smart home system (lighting, climate, security)
Walking distance to La Jolla Cove and Village

tagline: A rare beachside estate on one of Coronado Island's most prestigious streets, with white-water views and resort-caliber amenities.
description:
Positioned on Coronado's iconic Ocean Boulevard, this newly constructed estate delivers the island's most coveted combination: white-water views, direct beach access, and a level of finish rarely seen outside of custom development. The open-plan main level flows from a formal living room with a statement fireplace to a professional-grade kitchen and a dining area that seats twelve.

Glass pocket doors dissolve the boundary between the living spaces and a broad ocean-facing terrace, where a heated pool, built-in barbecue station, and fire pit create a year-round outdoor room. The second-floor primary suite is a private retreat — the bedroom opens to a dedicated ocean-view deck, and the bath features an oversized steam shower, freestanding soaking tub, and his-and-her dressing rooms.

Coronado Village, with its award-winning restaurants, boutique shops, and the legendary Hotel del Coronado, is blocks away. San Diego's business districts are a short ferry or bridge commute.
features: Direct beach access and white-water Pacific views
Professional-grade kitchen with La Cornue range
Heated saltwater pool and outdoor fire pit
Primary suite with dedicated ocean-view deck
Home theater and temperature-controlled wine room
Four-car garage with car-lift capability
Lutron whole-home smart lighting and AV
Two blocks from Hotel del Coronado

tagline: A private Covenant estate on 2.1 acres of lush grounds, blending Spanish Colonial architecture with contemporary luxury.
description:
Set behind private gates in Rancho Santa Fe's storied Covenant, this Spanish Colonial estate commands 2.1 acres of mature-canopied grounds and delivers the unhurried luxury of village life at its finest. Red-tile roofs, hand-painted Talavera tile accents, and arched colonnades anchor the architecture in the Covenant's century-old design tradition, while the interiors have been completely reimagined with a refined contemporary lens.

The great room's vaulted, exposed-beam ceiling soars above wide-plank white oak floors and a double-sided fireplace that connects indoor and outdoor living spaces. The kitchen is equipped for serious entertaining: a 60-inch La Canche range, twin dishwashers, a separate prep kitchen, and a walk-in pantry. The primary wing — entirely private from the guest quarters — occupies the south end of the home with a bedroom that opens to a loggia, a sitting room, and a spa bath with garden courtyard views.

Outdoors, a resort pool with grotto, a full outdoor kitchen with wood-fired pizza oven, a sport court, and a four-stall stable round out an estate built for both grand entertaining and quiet family living.
features: Private gated Covenant estate on 2.1 acres
Spanish Colonial architecture with contemporary interiors
60-inch La Canche range and professional prep kitchen
Resort pool with grotto and outdoor kitchen
Sport court and four-stall stable
Primary wing with spa bath and private loggia
Guest casita with full kitchen and private entrance
Minutes from RSF Golf Club and Village shops
